resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT call is available for lactase-persistence context. This is not a diagnosis, symptom explanation, diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, weight-loss prediction, or model-derived health result.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can provide lactose-related context, but symptoms, diet history, activity, labs, environment, medications, and professional review matter for health and nutrition decisions.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: No calibrated healthy-weight, weight-loss response, obesity-risk, meal-plan, supplement, activity, metabolic, diet-history, lab, sleep, stress, cortisol, or ancestry applicability model is supplied with this fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: CDC BMI / MedlinePlus DTC result limits / GWAS Catalog
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The local output can describe supplied marker context and unavailable sections, but it must not create diet, supplement, activity, glucose, gut, weight, stress, sleep, cortisol, wellness, symptom, lab, metabolic, or treatment conclusions without validated evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports a low-total-fat pattern, with a displayed target of 23-31% of daily calories and 84-109 g/day. The visible gene table lists APOA5, LEPR, PPARG, and FTO markers.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local fat-intake target or weight-loss recommendation.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports a high-monounsaturated-fat pattern, with a displayed target of 12-17% of daily calories and 45-63 g/day. The visible gene table lists ADIPOQ and PPARG markers.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local MUFA target or diet prescription.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports normal omega-3 needs, with a displayed target of 1,100 mg/day. The visible gene table lists ADIPOQ GP000031.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local omega-3 recommendation or supplement instruction.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports a low-omega-6 pattern, with a displayed target of 5-7% of daily calories and 18-26 g/day. The visible gene table lists TNF GP000032.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local omega-6 target.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports a moderately-low saturated-fat pattern, with a displayed target of less than 8% of daily calories and less than 30 g/day. The visible gene table lists APOA2 and LEPR markers.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local saturated-fat target or cardiometabolic recommendation.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports a moderately-high-carbohydrate pattern, with a displayed target of 50-58% of daily calories and 414-471 g/day. The visible gene table lists FTO GP000003.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local carbohydrate target, glucose interpretation, or meal plan.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports a moderately-high-fiber pattern, with a displayed target of 14-19 g/day. The visible gene table lists FTO GP000008.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not local fiber, glucose, gut-health, or treatment advice.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports normal protein needs, with a displayed target of 15-20% of daily calories and 122-163 g/day. The visible gene table lists FTO GP000011.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local protein target or activity recommendation.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample row reports high vitamin E intake, with a displayed target greater than 15 mg/day. The visible gene table lists COMT GP000051 and indicates the sample genotype could not be detected.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not a local vitamin E target, blood-level interpretation, or supplement dose.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample sidebar includes stress-related rows for sleep-quality and cortisol context. The visible gene table lists ADA GP000121 and FKBP5 GP000136.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample sidebar structure, not a local sleep, stress, cortisol, mental-health, or treatment finding.

resultRows.item: BMI, waist-to-hip ratio, and body fat percentage glossary
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample appendix explains body mass index, waist-to-hip ratio, and body fat percentage as measurement concepts used in weight-related context.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Healthy Weight sample PDF and paired with CDC BMI background; this is education about measurement concepts, not a local BMI category, body-fat estimate, or waist-to-hip result.

sampleRows.description: The public sample PDF introduces Healthy Weight as a nutrigenetic weight-management report and summarizes nutrient categories tied to weight outcomes.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample summary highlights healthy fats, saturated-fat swaps, omega-3 oils, complex carbohydrates, fiber-rich snacks, protein foods, and vitamin E foods.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from pages 2-6 of the public GenoPalate Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure, not local diet advice.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows APOA5 GP000023 AA, LEPR GP000025 AG, PPARG GP000018 CC, and FTO GP000003 AA for total fat context.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to decrease BMI on low-total fat intake; recommendation 23-31% of daily calories and 84-109 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 9 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local fat-intake target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows ADIPOQ GP000033 GG, ADIPOQ GP000034 GG, and PPARG GP000018 CC for monounsaturated fat context.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to decrease BMI when consuming high-monounsaturated fat intake; recommendation 12-17% of daily calories and 45-63 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 10 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local monounsaturated-fat target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows ADIPOQ GP000031 TT and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: normal omega-3 needs; recommendation 1,100 milligrams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 11 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local omega-3 target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows TNF GP000032 AG and links it to low-omega-6 intake in the sample output.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to decrease BMI when consuming low-omega-6 intake; recommendation 5-7% of daily calories and 18-26 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 12 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local omega-6 target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows APOA2 GP000027 GG and LEPR GP000025 AG for saturated-fat context.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to decrease BMI when consuming moderately-low saturated fat intake; recommendation below 8% of daily calories and below 30 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 13 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local saturated-fat target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows FTO GP000003 TT and says this sample genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: recommend moderately high-carbohydrate intake; recommendation 50-58% of daily calories and 414-471 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 16 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local carbohydrate target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows FTO GP000008 CC and links it to moderately high-fiber intake in the sample output.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to decrease BMI when consuming moderately high-fiber intake; recommendation 14-19 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 17 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local fiber target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows FTO GP000011 TT and says this sample genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: normal protein needs; recommendation 15-20% of daily calories and 122-163 grams per day.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 19 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local protein target.

sampleRows.description: The sample gene table shows COMT GP000051 with an undetected genotype and the note that the genotype could not be detected from the file provided.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: recommend high-vitamin E intake; recommendation above 15 milligrams per day; COMT genotype not detected from the provided sample file.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 20 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not a local vitamin E target or deficiency claim.

sampleRows.description: The sample stress insights page previews two variants from the full report and includes sleep quality and cortisol-level context.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample preview rows: ADA GP000121 CC, more likely to have sleep issues under stress; FKBP5 GP000136 TT, more likely to have elevated cortisol levels.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 25 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed sample output, not local stress, sleep, cortisol, or treatment advice.

sampleRows.description: The public sample PDF includes body-measurement education pages after the gene and lifestyle sections.
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample appendix explains BMI, waist-to-hip ratio, and body fat percentage categories as general measurement context.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from pages 28-29 of the public Healthy Weight sample PDF; this is observed appendix structure, not a local body measurement or diagnosis.

healthyWeightContext: Use this report as educational healthy-weight genetics context, not as a weight-loss prediction, obesity-risk score, meal plan, supplement plan, or activity prescription.

Treat GenoPalate sample nutrient targets, food examples, recipes, lifestyle rows, stress rows, and body-measurement descriptions as observed sample-report structure unless validated local evidence supports equivalent sections.
Plan diet, activity, weight, supplement, sleep, and stress decisions using diet history, symptoms, activity, labs, medical context, preferences, and professional support.
Do not use genotype alone to predict weight loss, diagnose obesity or metabolic disease, choose supplements, interpret labs, or change treatment.

plainEnglishLimits: Nutrition and weight outcomes depend on diet, activity, symptoms, medications, labs, medical history, environment, and professional review, not genotype alone.
Public sample rows show observed report format and source binding; they are not local personal findings unless the local run supplies equivalent validated evidence.

The local fixture does not include body measurements, diet history, activity history, glucose or A1C labs, supplement use, sleep measures, stress measures, cortisol labs, or a calibrated weight model.

The GenoPalate Healthy Weight rows are public sample-report examples and are not local target recommendations.

Broader symptoms, food history, diet history, activity history, body measurements, labs, medications, medical history, child-specific context, ancestry applicability, environment, and professional assessment are not represented in this fixture.
Displayed sample marker IDs have not been resolved to genomic coordinates; repeated marker labels such as FTO GP000003 are preserved as sample display rows instead of merged biological variants.
uncertainty: Nutrition, lifestyle, symptoms, labs, weight, glucose, gut health, supplement response, stress, sleep, cortisol, and wellness outcomes depend on genetics plus non-genetic context and professional review.
Public sample report rows are useful for output-format parity and citation binding, but they do not establish local genotype effects or individual recommendations.
A single marker should not be used to diagnose conditions, explain symptoms, prescribe diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, estimate BMI or body fat, or guide treatment.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not predict weight loss, diagnose obesity or metabolic disease, prescribe diets, create meal plans, recommend supplements, interpret labs, or provide treatment guidance.
Healthy Weight sample rows are source-bound to the public PDF for format parity; marketplace detail parity remains pending.
